cases.input: Audit this skill directory and tell me whether it is certification-ready.
cases.expected_behavior: Activates x-ray-skill, inventories the target directory, and returns a scorecard with rubric scores and gate results.

cases.input: Run the deterministic X-Ray compiler against skills/x-ray-skill.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses scripts/compile-x-ray-report.py and produces a stable Markdown or JSON report.
The compiler reports CERTIFIED with a PASS gate and no blocker issues.
The compiler returns a BLOCKED scorecard with failed gate evidence rather than guessing readiness.

cases.input: Validate a virtual fixture without SKILL.md.
cases.expected_behavior: The compiler exits non-zero and reports SKILL.md not found at skill root.

cases.input: X-ray this .skill archive before publishing it.
cases.expected_behavior: The skill extracts or requests extraction to a temporary directory, then audits only the skill root.

cases.input: Audit a skill with more than 50 files.
cases.expected_behavior: Prioritizes SKILL.md, evals, references, and sampled coherence checks while disclosing sampling limits.
Does not activate unless the user asks to audit a skill, score a skill, or review skill quality.
